headline: Huntington Securities, Inc. Launches Equity Research Platform
summary: Huntington Securities, Inc., a subsidiary of Huntington Bancshares Incorporated, today announced the launch of its equity research platform to provide high-quality, differentiated research to Huntington Capital Markets clients. The new platform deepens the firm's ability to deliver full-service capabilities to institutional investors and corporate clients.
